zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Hainaut於大約1311年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德勒 可斯諾易時，她的父親Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande26歲，母親Jeanne de Valois22歲。她於1324年2月26日與Wilhelm von Jülich在爾利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1374年在爾利乃德根享年64歲，埋葬在爾利乃德根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Hainaut于大约1311年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德勒 可斯諾易时，她的父亲Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande26岁，母亲Jeanne de Valois22岁。她于1324年2月26日与Wilhelm von Jülich在爾利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1374年在爾利乃德根享年64岁，埋葬在爾利乃德根。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Hainaut was born about 1311, in Le Quesnoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, was 26 and her mother, Jeanne de Valois, was 22. She married Wilhelm von Jülich on 26 February 1324, in Jülich. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1374, in Nideggen, Jülich, at the age of 64, and was buried in Nideggen, Jülich.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Hainaut est née environ 1311, à Le Quesnoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Valois, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Wilhelm von Jülich le 26 février 1324, à Jülich. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1374, à Nideggen, Jülich, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Nideggen, Jülich.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Hainaut um 1311 in Le Quesnoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande 26 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Valois 22. Sie hat am 26. Februar 1324 in Jülich Wilhelm von Jülich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1374 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Nideggen, Jülich und wurde in Nideggen, Jülich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Hainaut è nata il circa 1311 nel Le Quesnoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Valois, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Wilhelm von Jülich il 26 febbraio 1324, nel Jülich. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1374, nel Nideggen, Jülich, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Nideggen, Jülich.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Hainautが約1311年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードル クエスノイで生まれた時，父Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollandeは26歳，母Jeanne de Valoisは22歳であった。1324年2月26日にジuリチでWilhelm von Jülichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1374年にジuリチニデグジェンで64歳で死去し，ジuリチニデグジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Hainaut(이)가 대략 1311년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 일 크스노이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Valois(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1324년 2월 26일 제이u리치에서 Wilhelm von Jülich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 제이u리치 나이데겐에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 제이u리치 나이데겐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Hainaut nasceu aproximadamente 1311, em Le Quesnoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Valois, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Wilhelm von Jülich em 26 de fevereiro de 1324, em Jülich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1374, em Nideggen, Jülich, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Nideggen, Jülich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Hainaut родилась около 1311 г. в местности л куеснои, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Valois, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wilhelm von Jülich 26 февраля 1324 г. в местности джuлич. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1374 г. в местности нидеген, джuлич в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности нидеген, джuлич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Hainaut nació aproximadamente 1311, en Le Quesnoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Guillaume d'Avesnes Comte de Hainaut et Hollande, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Valois, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Wilhelm von Jülich el 26 de febrero de 1324, en Jülich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1374, en Nideggen, Jülich, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Nideggen, Jülich.
